heading: Records centers and centralized microfilming or digitization services
label: 2907 Records centers and centralized microfilming or digitization services
text: The Archivist may establish, maintain, and operate records centers and centralized microfilming or digitization services for Federal agencies.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 2907, , , , contained provisions similar to those comprising this section, prior to repeal by .Pub. L. 90–62082 Stat. 1297Pub. L. 94–575, § 2(a)(3)Oct. 22, 1968
Amendments2014— inserted “or digitization” after “microfilming” in section catchline and text.Pub. L. 113–1871984— substituted “Archivist” for “Administrator”.Pub. L. 98–497
Effective Date of 1984 AmendmentAmendment by effective , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 98–497section 301 of Pub. L. 98–497section 2102 of this titleApr. 1, 1985
